positive: A neo-illustrative, symmetrical composition featuring a celestial forest scene. The main subject is a graceful, mythological stag with antlers made of glowing constellations and deep-sea coral. The stag stands within a grove of bioluminescent flora that casts vibrant neon-blue and emerald-green light. The background should feature deep indigo gradients speckled with white, glowing nebulae and geometric celestial patterns. Style must be highly detailed, linework-focused, and optimized for silkscreen printing, emphasizing strong contrast between the dark, velvety void and the vibrant, glowing elements. Central composition, perfect for apparel printing, vibrant color palette, clean silhouette, highly magical and mystical atmosphere.
negative: text, signature, watermark, blur, jpeg artifacts, grainy, low contrast, messy composition, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, distorted, amateur, sketch, photo, realism, low detail
